content: Archive crates: zip 8.x (pure Rust, MIT) for zip; sevenz-rust2 0.21 (active fork of sevenz-rust, MIT/Apache, pure Rust) for 7z; unrar 0.5.8 wrapper crate is MIT/Apache but bundles UnRAR C++ source whose license forbids using it to recreate the RAR algorithm -> non-free, GPL-incompatible, in Debian/Fedora non-free repos. tar 0.4 + xz2/flate2 for tar.* archives. Mods on Nexus are mostly 7z/zip; rar is rare.
